1956 年夏天，约翰·麦卡锡在达特茅斯学院组织了一场暑期研讨会，邀请了当时最顶: In the summer of 1956, John McCarthy organized a summer symposium at Dartmouth College that invited the leading computer scientists, mathematicians, and psychologists of the day. 1960 年代后期，AI 研究面临翻译不准确、感知机能力有限、组合爆炸等问题。1: In the late 1960s, AI research faced problems such as inaccurate translation, limited capabilities of perceptrons, and combinatorial explosion. 大模型的知识停留在训练截止日期。RAG 的做法是：用户提问 → 先从知识库检索相: The knowledge of large models is stuck at the training deadline. RAG's approach is: users ask questions → first retrieve relevant content from the knowledge base → give the retrieved information and questions to the model → the model answers based on these information. In this way, even if the model has not been trained with certain knowledge, it can still give accurate answers.
大模型刚训练完时，虽然能说很多话，但回答方式可能不符合人类期望——比如太啰嗦、太: When a large model is first trained, although it can say a lot, the way it answers may not meet human expectations—for example, it may be too wordy, too robotic, or offensive. What RLHF does is: let human annotators score different answers, then train a "reward model" to simulate human preferences, and finally use reinforcement learning to let the large model learn to generate answers that are more popular with humans.

GPT-4 时代的多模态体验往往由多个模型串联完成，语音交互需要分别经过转写、语: The multi-modal experience in the GPT-4 era is often completed by multiple models in series. Voice interaction requires transcription, language model and speech synthesis respectively, and the delay and information loss are obvious.
GPT-4 系列与 o1 系列分别承担通用对话和深度推理，用户和开发者需要在不同: The GPT-4 series and o1 series are responsible for general dialogue and deep reasoning respectively. Users and developers need to manually choose between different models, speed and cost.
GPT-4 在逻辑推理、编程、写作、考试等方面的能力远超前代模型。它能理解图像内: GPT-4's capabilities in logical reasoning, programming, writing, exams, etc. far exceed those of previous generations of models. It understands image content and conducts conversations based on images. Score in the top 10% on standardized tests such as the U.S. Bar Exam, Medical Licensing Examination, and more.
GPT-4 证明了多模态大模型的可行性，并将 AI 的推理能力推到了新高度。它也: GPT-4 proves the feasibility of multi-modal large models and pushes AI's reasoning capabilities to new heights. It also opens the door for subsequent AI Agent and multi-modal applications.
GPT-4o 的“o”代表 omni。模型原生接收并生成文本、音频和图像信息，语: The "o" in GPT-4o stands for omni. The model natively receives and generates text, audio and image information, with speech response speed close to human conversation and significantly reducing multi-modal reasoning costs.
GPT-5 家族统一快速与推理模式，并强化代码、工具调用和专业任务。产品路由开始: The GPT-5 family unifies fast and inference modes and enhances code, tool calls, and specialized tasks. Product routing begins to automatically decide whether to invest more inference calculations based on the difficulty of the problem.
GPT-5.4 与 5.5 已把百万上下文、计算机操作、托管 Shell、Ski: GPT-5.4 and 5.5 have incorporated millions of contexts, computer operations, managed shells, skills, and MCP into model workflows, but complex tasks still require more efficient tool orchestration and cross-round inference reuse.
GPT-5.6 允许模型在托管运行时中编写 JavaScript 调用合资格工具: GPT-5.6 can write JavaScript in a hosted runtime to call eligible tools. It also adds multi-agent orchestration in beta, explicit prompt caching, persisted reasoning, max reasoning effort, and Pro mode. Sol, Terra, and Luna target capability, cost balance, and throughput respectively.
IBM 的超级计算机 \"深蓝\" 在六局比赛中击败了国际象棋世界冠军卡斯帕罗夫: IBM's supercomputer "Deep Blue" defeated world chess champion Garry Kasparov in six games, becoming an iconic milestone in the history of AI development.
ImageNet 和 ILSVRC 为深度学习在图像识别领域的爆发提供了\"弹药: ImageNet and ILSVRC provided "ammunition" for the explosion of deep learning in the field of image recognition. Without ImageNet, AlexNet would have no stage for training and validation.
Llama 3 已形成庞大的开放模型生态，但多模态、长上下文与高效扩展仍是闭源旗: Llama 3 has formed a huge open model ecosystem, but multi-modality, long context and efficient expansion are still the main advantages of the closed-source flagship.
Llama 4 使用混合专家架构，只激活部分参数完成推理。Scout 强调超长上: Llama 4 uses a hybrid expert architecture that only activates some parameters to complete reasoning. Scout emphasizes long context, Maverick emphasizes comprehensive capabilities; both handle text and images natively.
Llama 把高能力开放权重模型带到研究者、开发者与本地部署场景，并推动开放模型: Llama brings high-capability open weight models to researchers, developers and local deployment scenarios, and promotes the open model to become an independent ecosystem.
Llama 打破了 OpenAI 和 Google 对大语言模型的垄断，让全球开: Llama breaks OpenAI and Google's monopoly on large language models, allowing developers around the world to locally deploy and customize powerful language models. It has given rise to a prosperous ecosystem of open source models such as Mistral, Qwen, and DeepSeek.
LLM 不是\"有意识\"的，它只是在预测最可能的下一个词。: LLM is not "conscious", it is just predicting the most likely next word.
LLM 没有真正的理解，它的知识来自训练数据的统计模式。: LLM has no real understanding, its knowledge comes from the statistical patterns of the training data.
LLM 是 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 等所有现代 AI 聊天产: LLM is the underlying foundation of all modern AI chat products such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc. Understanding LLM is the starting point for understanding the entire modern AI industry.
MCP 把 Agent 生态的重点从单个工具调用推进到可共享、可组合的连接协议。: MCP advances the focus of the Agent ecosystem from a single tool call to a shareable and composable connection protocol.
MCP 定义了一套标准协议，让 AI 模型可以统一地连接各种工具、数据库、文件系: MCP defines a set of standard protocols that allow AI models to uniformly connect to various tools, databases, file systems, and APIs. Developers can implement the MCP server so that different AI applications can access the same tools and data sources.
MCP 解决了 AI Agent 生态的核心问题——碎片化。在此之前，每个 AI: MCP solves the core problem of the AI ​​Agent ecosystem - fragmentation. Previously, each AI application and integration between each tool was custom-made. MCP provides a set of standards that allow tools and AI applications to be plug-and-play.
Meta 发布 Llama 4 Scout 与 Maverick，采用混合专家架: Meta releases Llama 4 Scout and Maverick, which adopt a hybrid expert architecture and natively support multi-modality, pushing the open weight model to ultra-long context and higher computational efficiency.
Meta 发布了 Llama 系列大语言模型，虽然最初以研究为目的非公开泄露，但: Meta released the Llama series of large language models. Although it was initially leaked privately for research purposes, it quickly spawned a global open source large model ecosystem and changed the power structure of the AI ​​industry.
Meta 发布了多个尺寸的 Llama 模型，虽然最初未完全开源，但权重泄露后，: Meta released Llama models in multiple sizes. Although it was not fully open source initially, after the weights were leaked, the community quickly derived fine-tuned versions such as Alpaca and Vicuna. Subsequently, Meta officially opened Llama 2, Llama 3, Llama 3.1 and other versions, gradually establishing the benchmark status of open source large models.
Meta 开源大模型打破闭源垄断: Meta open source large model breaks closed source monopoly
MoE 是扩大模型容量同时控制训练和推理成本的重要路线。: MoE is an important route to expand model capacity while controlling training and inference costs.
NLP 任务需要为每个任务单独设计和训练模型。: NLP tasks require individually designing and training models for each task.
NLP 依赖 RNN/LSTM 进行序列建模，训练慢、难并行化、长序列效果差。: NLP relies on RNN/LSTM for sequence modeling, which is slow to train, difficult to parallelize, and has poor effect on long sequences.
NLP 主要依赖词袋模型和 one-hot 编码，无法捕捉语义关系。: NLP mainly relies on bag-of-words models and one-hot encoding, which cannot capture semantic relationships.
o1 让测试时计算成为继训练数据、参数与算力之后的另一条扩展轴，也让“推理模型”: o1 makes test-time calculations another axis of expansion after training data, parameters, and computing power, and also makes "inference models" an independent product category.
o1 通过强化学习学习更长的内部推理过程，并随着测试时计算增加而提高表现。它在高: o1 learns longer internal reasoning processes through reinforcement learning and improves performance as test-time computations increase. It demonstrates a different ability curve from ordinary chat models on difficult math, science, and code benchmarks.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-3，拥有 1750 亿参数，展示了令人惊叹的 few: OpenAI released GPT-3, which has 175 billion parameters and demonstrated amazing few-shot learning capabilities, making the world realize for the first time that scale can bring about qualitative changes in capabilities.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-4，首个在视觉和语言能力上都达到顶级水平的大模型，能: OpenAI releases GPT-4, the first large-scale model to achieve state-of-the-art performance in both visual and language capabilities, capable of understanding image input and generating high-quality text, surpassing most human candidates in multiple human exams.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-4o，以同一神经网络处理文本、视觉与音频，让实时语音: OpenAI releases GPT-4o, which uses the same neural network to process text, vision, and audio, making real-time voice and visual interaction a native capability of a general model for the first time.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5，把即时回答、深度推理、代码与工具使用整合进同一模: OpenAI released GPT-5, which integrates instant answers, deep reasoning, code and tool usage into the same model family, and the model begins to automatically allocate calculations based on tasks.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.6，以 Sol、Terra、Luna 三档覆盖旗: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 in three tiers—Sol, Terra, and Luna—spanning frontier capability, cost balance, and throughput, with programmatic tool calling, multi-agent orchestration, explicit caching, and persisted reasoning.
OpenAI 发布 o1-preview，把更多计算放到回答前的推理过程，在数学: OpenAI released o1-preview, which puts more calculations into the reasoning process before answering, significantly improving the ability to solve complex problems in mathematics, science and programming tasks.
OpenAI 发布了 ChatGPT，一个面向普通用户的对话式 AI 产品，两个: OpenAI released ChatGPT, a conversational AI product for ordinary users. Within two months, the number of monthly active users exceeded 100 million, making it the fastest-growing consumer application in history.
Prompt 不只是一个问题，也可以包含角色、目标、材料、格式和例子。模型会根据: A prompt is not just a question, but can also include roles, goals, materials, format, and examples. The model uses this information to decide what to generate next.
R1 把“前沿推理能力能否开放、能否低成本复现”从假设变成现实问题。它推动行业重: R1 turns "whether cutting-edge reasoning capabilities can be opened up and reproduced at low cost" from a hypothesis to a real issue. It drives the industry to re-evaluate the price of closed-source models, the capabilities boundaries of open models, and the role of reinforcement learning in inference training.
R1 让开放推理模型成为全球焦点，但长期 Agent 工作还需要更大上下文、更稳: R1 brings open inference models into the global spotlight, but long-term agent work also requires greater context, more stable tool usage, and lower inference costs.
RAG 是让大模型接入现实世界知识的核心技术方案。企业知识库、AI 搜索、文档问: RAG is the core technical solution for allowing large models to access real-world knowledge. Scenarios such as enterprise knowledge base, AI search, and document Q&A are mostly based on RAG.
RLHF 是 ChatGPT 对话体验好的关键原因之一。它将一个\"能说话\"的: RLHF is one of the key reasons why the ChatGPT conversation experience is great. It turns a "talking" model into a "human-speaking" model.

Rumelhart、Hinton 和 Williams 发表了反向传播算法论文，: Rumelhart, Hinton, and Williams published a paper on the backpropagation algorithm, which solved the problem of training multi-layer neural networks and laid the mathematical foundation for deep learning.
Scaling Law 为大模型时代持续扩大训练规模提供了工程和投资依据。: Scaling Law provides the engineering and investment basis for continued expansion of training scale in the era of large models.
SWE-bench 让 Coding Agent 的能力开始有更贴近真实工作的评: SWE-bench allows Coding Agent's capabilities to be evaluated in a way that is closer to real work.
Token 不一定等于一个字或一个单词。模型会把文本切成更适合计算的小片段，再把: Token is not necessarily equal to a word or word. The model cuts the text into smaller pieces that are more suitable for calculations and converts them into numerical representations.
Transformer 成为 NLP 和后续多模态 AI 的统一基础架构。: Transformer becomes the unified infrastructure for NLP and subsequent multimodal AI.
Transformer 是现代 AI 最重要的架构创新。它直接催生了 BERT、: Transformer is the most important architectural innovation in modern AI. It directly gave birth to BERT, GPT series, T5, Llama, Claude and almost all mainstream large language models. The underlying architecture of ChatGPT is Transformer’s decoder.
Transformer 是一种让计算机理解语言的新方法。它的核心创新是\"注意力: Transformer is a new way for computers to understand language. Its core innovation is the "attention mechanism" - when processing each word, the model will pay attention to all other words in the sentence at the same time, instead of looking down word by word like human reading. This allows the model to better understand the context and is easier to train at scale.
V4-Pro 采用 1.6T 总参数、49B 激活参数，面向高难度推理与 Age: V4-Pro uses 1.6T total parameters and 49B activation parameters, and is oriented to highly difficult reasoning and agent programming; V4-Flash provides a faster and more economical option with a smaller activation scale. The official service provides 1M context and thinking/non-thinking dual modes by default.
Word2Vec 让 NLP 从业者可以用向量来表示语言，而不是传统的离散符号。: Word2Vec allows NLP practitioners to represent language using vectors instead of traditional discrete symbols. This is a key step in the shift from symbolic to neural network methods in NLP.
Word2Vec 使用浅层神经网络将每个词映射为一个稠密向量，使得语义相似的词在: Word2Vec uses a shallow neural network to map each word into a dense vector so that semantically similar words are close in the vector space. It also demonstrates the famous semantic operation "king - man + woman ≈ queen".
